data.body: Done definition update (adversarial review): E2E test must distinguish 'check passed' from 'check posted at all'. Assertions: (a) each of the 11 named required contexts posts a conclusion (success/failure/skipped) to the test PR — not 'pending' or 'expected'; AND (b) the Ruleset blocks merge when any one of them reports failure (introduce a synthetic failing change to a single check). Without (a), a name-drift typo produces a never-posted phantom check that an E2E only asserting mergeability-after-green would pass.
